text.title: Batch + Cache Stack Procedure
text.summary: Five-step procedure to convert a sync uncached pipeline into batch+cache.

step.name: extract-prefix
step.action: Identify the longest substring shared byte-for-byte across all items. Compute hash.

step.name: hoist-per-item-context
step.action: Move any per-item context (timestamp, request_id, doc URL, query text) out of the prefix and into the user turn at the end.

step.name: insert-cache-control
step.action: Place cache_control marker at the end of the system prompt block (or end of tools block, whichever is the stable tail).

step.name: switch-to-batch-endpoint
step.action: Replace sync `messages.create` with `batches.create`; aggregate items until batch_size ≥ target; submit; poll.

step.name: monitor-and-tune
step.action: Track cache_read_input_tokens / total prefix tokens = hit_rate. Tune marker position if hit_rate < 0.9.
step.decision-gate: If hit_rate stays < 0.5 after one week, root-cause prefix drift before declaring savings real.
